flow_points: Zimbabwe scored 45 runs for 2 wickets in their Powerplay.
KT Maphaka delivered a crucial bowling spell of 4.0 overs, conceding 21 runs and taking 2 wickets.
Maphaka's spell sustained defensive pressure for South Africa, achieving an impact score of 89.86.
Sikandar Raza anchored Zimbabwe's innings with 73 runs off 43 balls.
Raza's strong performance contributed 47.7% of Zimbabwe's total runs.
South Africa's Powerplay yielded 43 runs but at the cost of 3 wickets.
This early loss of 3 wickets prevented South Africa from building a stable foundation.
Sikandar Raza later delivered a crucial bowling spell for Zimbabwe, taking 3 wickets for 29 runs in 4 overs.
D Brevis anchored South Africa's chase, contributing 27.3% of the team's runs.
South Africa ultimately secured the victory by 5 wickets.
